name: crewdock
description: Desktop workspace switcher with PTY-backed terminals and built-in source control

scripts.sync:xterm: mkdir -p src-web/vendor && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/lib/xterm.mjs src-web/vendor/xterm.mjs && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css src-web/vendor/xterm.css && cp node_modules/@xterm/addon-fit/lib/addon-fit.mjs src-web/vendor/addon-fit.mjs
